sites.name: Esoit Village (Eiti Primary School)
sites.sub_location: Esoit Village, near Olkejuado Boys High School
sites.notes: Phase 2 fieldwork site. Kajiado County - off-grid community, Eiti Primary area. Southern Rift Valley semi-arid zone. Coordinates verified April 2026.
